puzzle.title: The Gentle Soul Among the Prophets
puzzle.intro: A voice calling to righteousness echoes through the verses of the Noble Quran. This blessed soul was granted prophecy and divine scripture during a time when guidance was desperately needed among the Children of Israel. This individual spoke directly to their people, urging them toward remembrance of their Lord. Through patience and devotion, they became a beacon of light whose story illuminates pages of sacred scripture. Can you identify this remarkable figure whose name is honored in both Quran and Gospel?
clues: I was honored with prophethood and a heavenly book during my people's time of need.
My mother gave birth to me in a remarkable manner, through Allah's divine command alone.
I addressed my people, saying 'O Children of Israel! I am the messenger of Allah to you, confirming what came before me.'
I came with clear signs from your Lord, bringing glad tidings of a prophet whose name would be Ahmad.
My mother was a righteous woman who devoted me to Allah's service from my youth.
Allah taught me the Quran and made me compassionate and dutiful to my mother, and I was not arrogant or disobedient.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Spoke in the cradle as an infant
Carried the Ark of the Covenant
trial.answer: Spoke in the cradle as an infant

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Was taken up to the heavens bodily
Was tested with leprosy for years
Built a great temple for worship
Led the Israelites back to faith
Divided the sea with a staff
outcome.answer: Was taken up to the heavens bodily

puzzle.arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ يَـٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُم مُّصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَىَّ مِنَ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ وَمُبَشِّرًۢا بِرَسُولٍۢ يَأْتِى مِنۢ بَعْدِى ٱسْمُهُۥٓ أَحْمَدُ ۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
puzzle.verse: And [mention] when Jesus, the son of Mary, said, "O Children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allāh to you confirming what came before me of the Torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Aḥmad." But when he came to them with clear evidences, they said, "This is obvious magic." (61:6)
